title: rubus × adeanus
intro: Rubus × adeanus is a hybrid species of raspberry, created by crossing the American red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Asian raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × adeanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, among others. Rubus × adeanus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
